_comment: Claude Code MCP configuration for android-llm-bridge. Put this into ~/.claude/mcp-settings.json (or merge into mcpServers section of your existing file). Replace /path/to/android-llm-bridge with your actual clone path.

_notes.ALB_WORKSPACE: Where collected logs/bugreports/anr land. Default ~/.alb-workspace if unset.
_notes.ALB_LOG_LEVEL: debug | info | warning | error. For troubleshooting set to debug.
_notes.first_run: On first invocation, run: alb setup adb (or ssh / serial / wifi) interactively once. After that the MCP server can be started by Claude Code.
_notes.multiple_instances: If you want multiple configs (e.g. lab and dev), register them with different names: 'alb-lab', 'alb-dev', each pointing to its own ALB_PROFILE.
